title: elaeagnus umbellata var. parvifolia
intro: Elaeagnus umbellata var. parvifolia, also known as the silverberry or small-leaved silverberry, is a shrub in the Elaeagnaceae family, native to eastern Asia, known for its fragrant, white flowers and edible berries. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Elaeagnus umbellata var. parvifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function, making it a potential natural remedy for conditions such as arthritis, high blood pressure, and infections. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used medicinally.
